task_completion.description: Verify that a new sheet named 'Performance_Summary' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the sheet tabs at the bottom of the spreadsheet application. There should be a tab explicitly named 'Performance_Summary'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required column headers are present in the new sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the first row of the 'Performance_Summary' sheet. It should contain the headers: 'Agent_ID', 'Agent_Name', 'Total_Calls', 'AHT_Minutes', 'FCR_Percent', 'Avg_CSAT', and 'Bonus_Eligible'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the sheet is populated with the 20 agents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Agent_ID' and 'Agent_Name' columns. They should be populated with data for 20 different agents (typically spanning rows 2 through 21).

task_completion.description: Verify that the KPI columns (Total Calls, AHT, FCR, CSAT) are populated with calculated numerical values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Total_Calls', 'AHT_Minutes', 'FCR_Percent', and 'Avg_CSAT' columns. They should contain numbers, decimals, or percentages for each agent, indicating the metrics have been calculated.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Bonus_Eligible column is populated with 'Yes' or 'No'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Bonus_Eligible' column. The cells should contain the text 'Yes' or 'No' based on the agents' performance.

task_completion.description: Verify that conditional formatting is applied to highlight AHT values greater than 8.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'AHT_Minutes' column. Any cell with a numerical value strictly greater than 8.0 should be visually highlighted (e.g., a different background color or text color like red).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a spreadsheet GUI application to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a spreadsheet application interface (like LibreOffice Calc) being used to manipulate the data, rather than a terminal window running Python scripts or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used spreadsheet formulas rather than hardcoding the answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: When a calculated cell (KPIs or Bonus) is selected, the formula bar at the top should display a spreadsheet formula (e.g., =AVERAGEIFS(...), =COUNTIFS(...), =IF(...)) instead of a static typed number or text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is editing the correct workbook.
integrity.visual_evidence: The title bar of the spreadsheet application should display 'call_center_data.xlsx'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected sheet name is exactly 'Performance_Summary'. The expected columns in order are: 'Agent_ID', 'Agent_Name', 'Total_Calls', 'AHT_Minutes', 'FCR_Percent', 'Avg_CSAT', and 'Bonus_Eligible'. The sheet should contain data for exactly 20 agents.
